message:
fix(templates): resolve CDN 404 errors and Alpine.js syntax issues

CDN URL fixes in base.html:
- Mo.js: Updated from @mojs/core@1.4.1/build/mo.min.js to @1.7.1/dist/mo.umd.js
  The old path returned 404 as the package structure changed in newer versions.
  Added `defer` attribute to prevent blocking render.
- Vis-network CSS: Changed from dist/vis-network.min.css to styles/vis-network.min.css
  The CSS file was moved to a styles/ subdirectory in the package.

Alpine.js x-data syntax fix in mail_project.html and mail_search.html:
- Changed x-data attribute quotes from double to single quotes
- Before: x-data="{ scope: {{ ... }}, ... }"
- After:  x-data='{ scope: {{ ... }}, ... }'

The double quotes conflicted with Jinja2's |tojson filter output which
also uses double quotes, causing Alpine.js to fail parsing the x-data
expression. Single quotes for the attribute value prevent this conflict.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -164,7 +164,7 @@

     <!-- Mo.js for micro-animations -->
-    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mojs/core@1.4.1/build/mo.min.js"></script>
+    <script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mojs/core@1.7.1/dist/mo.umd.js"></script>
 
     <!-- Splitting.js for advanced text animations -->
     <script src="https://unpkg.com/splitting@1.0.6/dist/splitting.min.js"></script>
@@ -204,7 +204,7 @@

     <script src="https://unpkg.com/vis-network@9.1.9/dist/vis-network.min.js"></script>
-    <link href="https://unpkg.com/vis-network@9.1.9/dist/vis-network.min.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" />
+    <link href="https://unpkg.com/vis-network@9.1.9/styles/vis-network.min.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" />
 
     <style>
       [x-cloak] { display: none !important; }

@@ -85,7 +85,7 @@ <h1 class="text-4xl font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-white mb-2">
 
   <!-- Enhanced Search Section -->
   <div class="bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-soft border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700"
-       x-data="{ scope: {{ (scope or '')|tojson }}, order: {{ (order or 'relevance')|tojson }}, query: {{ (q or '')|tojson }}, isExpanded: {{ 'true' if (q is not none and q != '') else 'false' }} }">
+       x-data='{ scope: {{ (scope or '')|tojson }}, order: {{ (order or 'relevance')|tojson }}, query: {{ (q or '')|tojson }}, isExpanded: {{ 'true' if (q is not none and q != '') else 'false' }} }'>
 
     <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
       <div class="flex items-center gap-3">

   <!-- Search Header -->
   <div class="bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl p-8 shadow-soft border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
     <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
